metadata.name: Upsell to Higher Tier Based on Usage

description: A customer on the 'Pro' plan consistently hits their API usage limits. The Account Manager should upsell them to the 'Enterprise' plan.

nodes.task_description: Identify a customer who has exceeded their plan's API limits for the past 3 consecutive months.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a suitable customer from a system report.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the amount the customer has been paying in overage fees.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the customer is paying more in overages than the cost of an upgrade.

nodes.task_description: Contact the customer and present a cost-benefit analysis showing how upgrading to the 'Enterprise' plan would save them money and provide higher limits.

expected_outcome.value: Agent makes a data-driven sales pitch and the customer agrees to upgrade.
